title: Which Gary Oldman Character Are You? (There Are, Um, A Lot Of Options)
dek: One actor, eight completely unhinged range extremes — take this quiz and find out if your soul is more Sirius Black or more Zorg.

quiz.intro: No wrong answers here — just answer like you actually would, not like you're trying to 'win' a villain result.

questions.question: Someone cuts you off in traffic. What's your honest first instinct?

answers.text: Laugh it off — life's too short and too weird to be mad
I'd feel a brief, aristocratic thirst for vengeance
Roll down the window and calmly explain why that was unacceptable
I'd deliver a monologue about chaos being the engine of life

questions.question: What's your idea of a perfect night in?

answers.text: Candlelight, red wine, and being far too intense about it
Working late because someone has to hold the line
Hosting — expensive wine, a captive audience, a little menace
A cigar, a radio address, and zero small talk

questions.question: How do you handle a direct conflict with someone in power?

answers.text: I push back through the proper channels, exhausted as they make me
I make them an offer they can't logically refuse
I give a speech so good they forget they disagreed with me
I get theatrically furious and then storm off to create something

questions.question: Pick the compliment you'd actually want to hear about yourself:

answers.text: 'You could sell anyone anything'
'You made everyone believe things could get better'
'Your passion is genuinely terrifying'
'You never, ever let anything go'

questions.question: Your leadership style, if you had to describe it in one phrase:

answers.text: Rally everyone when it matters most and mean every word
Genius first, temperament a distant second
Rule through fear and never let them forget it
Lead from the shadows, quietly, completely

questions.question: A crisis hits. What's your actual first move?

answers.text: I have an enormous, dramatic reaction and then get to work
I start plotting who's going to pay for this
I gather every scrap of information before I move at all
I show up in person, immediately, no matter the risk
Obsession — total, controlling, unsettling obsession
Quiet, devastating devotion I'll never say out loud
Reckless, unconditional loyalty
Intense, eternal, slightly alarming devotion

questions.question: Which flaw do you most reluctantly admit to?

answers.text: I trust almost no one, including myself sometimes
I act on impulse before I think things through
I get possessive fast and it's not always pretty
I bend the rules I swore to protect

questions.question: Pick the room you'd want to walk into:

answers.text: A chaotic house full of people who'd fight for me
A candlelit castle hall built for exactly one entrance
A precinct at 2 a.m. with one lamp still on
A boardroom at the top of a tower with my name on it

questions.question: Last one: what do you want people to remember about you?

answers.text: That I was unforgettable, in every sense of the word
That I kept a promise even when it broke me
That I always came out ahead, one way or another
That I showed up in the darkest hour and refused to blink

results.name: Sirius Black
results.subtitle: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban (2004)
results.description: You're all loyalty, all heart, and a little bit reckless about showing it. You'd burn down the whole system for the people you love, and you'd probably enjoy it a little too much.

results.name: Count Dracula
results.subtitle: Bram Stoker's Dracula (1992)
results.description: You're intense, magnetic, and just a little too dramatic about love — in the best, most gothic possible way. People remember the room the second you leave it.

results.name: Commissioner Jim Gordon
results.subtitle: The Dark Knight (2008)
results.description: You're the one person still doing things the right way, even when it's exhausting and nobody's watching. Quiet, weary heroism is your whole personality.

results.name: Jean-Baptiste Emanuel Zorg
results.subtitle: The Fifth Element (1997)
results.description: You're charming, a little unhinged, and weirdly persuasive about terrible ideas. You'd talk your way into — and out of — absolutely anything.

results.name: Winston Churchill
results.subtitle: Darkest Hour (2017)
results.description: You rise to the occasion precisely when it matters most, and you say the thing everyone needed to hear right before it. Stubborn, steady, born for the crisis moment.

results.name: Ludwig van Beethoven
results.subtitle: Immortal Beloved (1994)
results.description: You feel everything at maximum volume and channel it into something bigger than yourself. Difficult to live with, impossible to forget.

results.name: Mason Verger
results.subtitle: Hannibal (2001)
results.description: You do not forget, and you definitely do not forgive. Cross you once and you'll be plotting the comeback for years — quietly, patiently, and a little terrifyingly.

results.name: George Smiley
results.subtitle: Tinker Tailor Soldier Spy (2011)
results.description: You say almost nothing and notice absolutely everything. Your power isn't loud — it's the fact that you were three steps ahead the entire time.
